creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 206933
Remove MOTIF option from databases/grass7

databases/grass7 has an option, enabled by default, to use MOTIF.  This option does nothing, the configure options are not hooked up to anything and the port is not linked to motif or libGLw.
Since this pulls in a dependency on libGLw, which is deprecated, I'd like to remove this option and the dependency.
